# Gymverse: Gym Workout Planner · Fitness

Generated: Jul 22, 2026, 11:11 AM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 13, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _JustinKremer_, Jun 26, 2026, 1/5: "I really like this app, enough that I pay $20 a month for it. But it’s super annoying that trying to edit your workouts MAKES THE WHOLE APP FREEZE AND HARDLOCK AND IT DOESNT SAVE THE CHANGES!!!!!"
            2. _LeoDragon10_, Jun 3, 2026, 1/5: "New update crashes and not you use the app. Someone needs to fix this."
            3. _Marvin._, May 13, 2026, 4/5: "I have been using this app for years now and I like it a lot. I switched from another app and prefer this one. There are helpful guidance videos and texts. The videos could be a bit more detailed sometimes maybe with annotations. There has been a phase where the app was quite buggy but this hasn't been the case for a while now and i really like the new warmup routines they added. All in all I'm satisfied with this even though it might be pricier than other options but for this it provides a lot of functionality."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 29, 2026 - May 29, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Vazquez13b_, May 29, 2026, 5/5: "I like the app. It’s been a while since I really worked out so this worked well for me. 5 stars. Really the biggest improvements I would say are.. figuring out the apple watch situation Allowing me to go into a past workout and changing it. ( I did not do a set that’s 210 reps) It is a bit expensive but nothing crazy compared to the rest of the field.."
